form:Form.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP.BUSCAR2.form

form:Label.label: Escriba números de legajo separados por ',' o intervalos por '-'
form:Label.name: lbl_legajos

form:DateTime.name: fecha_desde
form:DateTime.descr: Fecha de Inicio del Horario para una Persona

form:DateTime.name: fecha_hasta
form:DateTime.descr: Fecha de Inicio del Horario para una Persona

form:SButton.label: Quitar los registros marcados
form:SButton.descrip: Eliminar el elemento de la Lista
form:SButton.name: Delete

form:SButton.label: Quitar todos los registros (excepto los marcados)
form:SButton.name: Clear

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EMP.d_empresa as EMPRESA, LEG.oi_personal_emp as id, LEG.e_numero_legajo as LEGAJO, PER.d_ape_y_nom as APE_Y_NOM FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP JOIN PER.oi_personal INNER LEG.oi_personal, LEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa WHERE LEG.oi_personal_emp IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

form:Resource.declare: <PARAM activos="1" empresa="1" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" where="LEG.oi_personal_emp in (select EXT.oi_personal_emp from LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as EXT where EXT.oi_liquidacion=1 )"/>
form:Resource.name: qry_persona

qry:select.name: sql1
sql1
sql1
sql_estructuras
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ESTR.oi_estructura as estructura FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as ESTR WHERE ESTR.oi_estr_padre = {#PARAM:@estructura} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql_ubi_desde
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_UBICACIONES.c_ubicacion FROM ORG03_UBICACIONES WHERE 1 = 1 {%?(#SOURCE:@ubicacion_desde!='') {% AND ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_ubicacion = {#SOURCE:@ubicacion_desde}%} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql_ubi_hasta
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_UBICACIONES.c_ubicacion FROM ORG03_UBICACIONES WHERE 1 = 1 {%?(#SOURCE:@ubicacion_hasta!='') {% AND ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_ubicacion = {#SOURCE:@ubicacion_hasta} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG.oi_personal_emp as id, EMP.c_empresa as EMPRESA, LEG.e_numero_legajo as LEGAJO FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP JOIN PER.oi_personal INNER LEG.oi_personal, LEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa WHERE LEG.oi_personal_emp IN ({%=#SOURCE:@values%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

form:Resource.name: qry_posicion
form:Resource.declare: <PARAM activos="1" empresa="1" nombre="correa" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" />

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' {%?(number(#SOURCE:@maxsize)>0) {% maxsize {%= 1+#SOURCE:@maxsize %} %} {% %} %} SELECT EMP.d_empresa as em, LEG.oi_personal_emp as id, LEG.e_numero_legajo as le, SEC.policy FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC, ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS as DEP, ORG51_SECTORES as SECTOR, ORG04_POSICIONES as POS JOIN PER.oi_personal INNER LEG.oi_personal, LEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa, LEG.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SEC.id, LEG.oi_posicion_ult LEFT OUTER POS.oi_posicion, POS.oi_departamento LEFT OUTER DEP.oi_departamento, POS.oi_sector LEFT OUTER SECTOR.oi_sector WHERE 1=1 {%?(#SOURCE:@activos='1') {% and LEG.oi_indic_activo= \'1\' %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@empresa!='') {% and LEG.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@empresa} %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@departamento!='') {% and DEP.oi_departamento = {#SOURCE:@departamento} %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@sector!='') {% and SECTOR.oi_sector = {#SOURCE:@sector} %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@where!='') {% and {%=#SOURCE:@where %} %} {% %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@cb_confidenciales != '' and #SOURCE:@cb_confidenciales!='T' ) {% {%? (#SOURCE:@cb_confidenciales = 'C') {% AND LEG.l_confidencial = 1%}{% AND LEG.l_confidencial = 0 %} %} %} {% %} %} ORDER BY em ASC, le ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

form:Resource.name: qry_autowhere_example
form:Resource.qry:where: $$LEG.oi_personal_emp in (select EXT.oi_personal_emp from LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as EXT where EXT.oi_liquidacion={%=SOURCE.empresa%} )$$
